datasets.title: Far Eastern brook lamprey
datasets.description: Adult Far Eastern brook lamprey (Lethenteron reissneri) whole-brain spatial transcriptomics dataset, sourced from DOI: 10.1126/science.aea2535. Supports spatial 3D/2D, UMAP, gene expression.
tags: region / cluster / level1 / level0 / level-1 / new_cluster / anno_whole_cluster

datasets.title: Marmoset Sagittal Brain Cellbin
datasets.description: Adult common marmoset (Callithrix jacchus) sagittal brain single-cell spatial transcriptomics dataset, sourced from DOI: 10.1126/science.aea2673. Supports spatial 3D/2D, UMAP, gene expression.

datasets.title: Marmoset Coronal Cortex Cellbin
datasets.description: Adult common marmoset (Callithrix jacchus) coronal cortex single-cell spatial transcriptomics dataset, sourced from DOI: 10.1126/science.aea2673.Supports spatial 3D/2D, UMAP, gene expression.

datasets.title: Marmoset Coronal Cortex Bin100
datasets.description: Adult common marmoset (Callithrix jacchus) coronal cortex Bin100 spatial transcriptomics dataset, sourced from DOI: 10.1126/science.aea2673. Supports spatial 3D/2D, UMAP, gene expression.

datasets.title: Mouse1 Cortex Cellbin
datasets.description: Adult mouse (Mus musculus) cortex single-cell spatial transcriptomics dataset, sourced from DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2025.02.015. All 75 slices are ordered by chip-number Z sequence; supports spatial 3D/2D, UMAP, gene expression.

datasets.title: Mouse Cortex Bin50
datasets.description: Adult mouse (Mus musculus) cortex single-cell spatial transcriptomics dataset, sourced from DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2025.02.015. All 75 slices are ordered by chip-number Z sequence; supports spatial 3D/2D, UMAP, gene expression.

datasets.title: Macaque Cortex Cellbin
datasets.description: Adult macaque (Macaca) cortex single-cell spatial transcriptomics dataset, sourced from DOI: 10.1126/science.aea2673. All 118 slices are ordered by the provided anatomical z sequence; supports spatial 3D/2D, UMAP, gene expression.
